hero.headline: Master the Art of Debate with your Personal AI Coach.
hero.headline_rich: Master the Art of Debate with your Personal <gradient>AI</gradient> Coach.
hero.subheadline: Practice solo, get real-time feedback, and crush your next competition. Designed for the next generation of Vietnamese debaters.
hero.announcement: AI Coach debates live with you

features.headline: Your AI Toolkit for Victory
features.subheadline: Powerful features built for competitive performance.

solo_practice.title: Solo Practice
solo_practice.description: Choose motions, set sides, and start the clock. Full WSDC & BP support.

transcription.title: Live Transcription
transcription.description: Ultra-accurate speech-to-text integration for post-speech flow review.

ai_analysis.title: AI Analysis
ai_analysis.description: Instant scoring in Content, Structure, Language, and Persuasion categories.

growth.title: Smart Growth
growth.description: Actionable feedback and model arguments to improve your flow instantly.

courses.headline: Structured Learning Paths
courses.subheadline: Go beyond practice — master debate with guided courses built for Vietnamese students.

foundations.title: Foundations of Competitive Debate
foundations.description: Master the fundamentals of argumentation, research, and delivery. Perfect for beginners and intermediate debaters.

speaking.title: Public Speaking Mastery
speaking.description: Build confidence, refine delivery, and learn advanced persuasion techniques for competitions and beyond.

step1.title: Learn
step1.description: Take structured courses with articles, quizzes, and video lessons on debate fundamentals.

step2.title: Practice
step2.description: Choose a topic, speak into the app, and get real-time transcription of your speech.

step3.title: Get Feedback
step3.description: Receive AI-powered scoring and detailed feedback on content, structure, and delivery.

step4.title: Ask AI Coach
step4.description: Chat with your personal AI debate coach anytime for tips, explanations, and practice.

0.quote: Thinkfy finally gave us the Truong Teen experience at home. The AI structure analysis helped me jump from regionals to the national finals!

1.quote: I practiced on Thinkfy 15 minutes every night, and saw a clear difference in 2 weeks. The feedback is more detailed than a real coach!

2.quote: The AI Coach explains WSDC format way better than textbooks. Our whole team now uses Thinkfy to warm up before tournaments.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes! Thinkfy is completely free. Just create an account and start practicing.
faq.q2: What do I need to get started?
faq.a2: Just a computer with a microphone (or headphones with a mic) and Chrome browser. That's it!
faq.q3: How accurate is the AI scoring?
faq.a3: Thinkfy's AI analyzes 4 criteria: Content, Structure, Language, and Persuasion. Detailed feedback for each category tells you exactly what to improve.

finalCta.headline: Ready to win your next debate?
finalCta.subheadline: Join the most advanced training platform for debaters in Vietnam. No more practicing to an empty room.

footer.tagline: Building the world's most intelligent debate training platform for future leaders.

welcome.headline: Welcome to Thinkfy
welcome.subheadline: Master the art of debate — one argument at a time

goal.compete: A competitor! We love that energy 🔥

goal.critical: You're already thinking like a debater
goal.interview: Smart move — debate skills are interview superpowers
goal.explore: Perfect — let's show you what debate is all about

experience.beginner: Everyone starts somewhere — you're going to love this

englishConfidence.low: No worries — we'll help you build confidence step by step

englishConfidence.high: Let's put that confidence to work!

dailyCommitment.5: 5 minutes a day is a great start — consistency beats intensity
dailyCommitment.10: 10 minutes daily can transform your skills in weeks
dailyCommitment.15: That's serious dedication — you'll see results fast
dailyCommitment.20: Wow, you're all in! Expect rapid progress 🚀

hero.completed_description: You finished this learning path. Revisit any lesson or choose another course to keep the momentum going.

beginner.one: Build a reliable foundation for clear, logical arguments.
beginner.two: Learn the core habits that make rebuttals easier later.
beginner.three: Move from instinctive speaking to structured debate rounds.

intermediate.one: Strengthen clash, comparison, and impact framing.
intermediate.two: Practice turning solid arguments into persuasive rounds.
intermediate.three: Sharpen the judgment calls that decide close debates.

advanced.one: Refine strategy, weighing, and late-round decision making.
advanced.two: Stress-test advanced techniques against tougher scenarios.
advanced.three: Train the details that separate strong debaters from standout ones.

beginner.one: Build comfort with voice, pacing, and stage presence.
beginner.two: Improve clarity so your ideas land the first time.
beginner.three: Grow confidence that carries back into debate rounds.

intermediate.one: Turn solid delivery into memorable, persuasive speaking.
intermediate.two: Practice transitions, emphasis, and stronger audience control.
intermediate.three: Develop the polish that makes your arguments feel effortless.

advanced.one: Refine high-stakes delivery for competitions and presentations.
advanced.two: Push beyond confidence into precision and command.
advanced.three: Train advanced speaking habits that elevate every round.

detail.unlock_subtitle: Enroll to open lesson navigation, completion tracking, and the structured module path.
detail.follow_subtitle: Move through each module in order, keep track of completed lessons, and jump back into the first unfinished step.

lesson.subtitle: Continue through {course} with a clearer sense of where this lesson sits in the module and the overall course.

practice.summary_description: Review the setup before jumping into the full practice studio.
practice.launch_note: This opens the main practice studio with this topic prefilled, so you can keep learning flow inside the course but practice in the full Thinkfy experience.
practice.coach_prep: Ask AI Coach to prep this

reader.preview_description: You can explore the lesson reader layout here, but enrolling unlocks the full lesson path, progress tracking, and next-step navigation.
reader.current_focus_description: You're on lesson {lesson} of {total}. Finish this step to unlock the next part of the course path.
reader.course_complete_description: You have cleared the active lesson path in this course. Revisit any lesson or jump back to your course library.
reader.stepper_description: Move step by step through the course and keep your place with stable lesson URLs.
reader.empty_state: This course does not have any published lessons available right now.
reader.need_help_description: Ask AI Coach for a summary, an example, or a clearer explanation of the lesson you're on.
reader.ready_for_next: Nice work. This lesson is complete, so you can move straight into the next one.
reader.complete_quiz_to_continue: Finish the quiz above to unlock the next lesson in the sequence.
reader.mark_complete_prompt: When you're ready, mark lesson {lesson} as complete to keep the course moving.
reader.article_summary_fallback: Read through the lesson carefully and focus on how each section supports clearer, stronger arguments.
reader.video_summary_fallback: Watch how the framework is explained in action, then bring that structure back into your own speaking.
reader.practice_summary_fallback: Use this guided practice to turn the lesson into spoken argument-building and live response work.
reader.quiz_summary: {count} questions to check your understanding before you move on.
reader.article_full_notes_description: Open the complete written lesson when you want the full explanation and supporting detail.
reader.article_common_mistake_fallback: Watch out for jumping from a claim straight to evidence without explaining the reasoning in between.
reader.article_try_this_fallback: Restate the idea in your own words, then turn it into one claim, one reason, and one impact.
reader.article_outline_fallback: Read through the lesson carefully, then use the course actions below to mark your progress and move on.
reader.article_reading_description: Take your time with the examples, definitions, and reasoning below.
reader.video_panel_description: Watch the full explanation, then use the notes below to lock in the key structure.
reader.video_missing_description: This lesson does not have an embeddable video yet, but the rest of the course reader is ready.
reader.video_why_matters_fallback: Use this lesson to hear how the framework sounds in a real explanation, then bring that structure into your own speeches.
reader.video_watch_for_fallback: Notice how the speaker introduces the claim, builds the reasoning, and explains the impact before moving on.
reader.quiz_result_summary: You answered {correct} out of {total} questions correctly.
reader.practice_setup_description: Launch the full practice studio with this lesson already prepared.
reader.practice_description_fallback: Use this guided practice to turn the lesson into spoken argument-building and live response work.

practice.page_subtitle: Pick a topic, choose how you want to practice, configure your session, and start improving.
practice.how_it_works_description: Choose a motion, tune your settings, and launch a solo practice round with instant AI support built in.
practice.how_it_works_step_1_title: Choose a motion that feels worth arguing.
practice.how_it_works_step_1_body: Browse by category, sort by popularity or difficulty, and save topics you want to come back to later.
practice.how_it_works_step_2_title: Set the type of round you want right now.
practice.how_it_works_step_2_body: Switch between speaking practice and debate practice, then adjust side, prep time, speech time, hints, and AI difficulty.
practice.how_it_works_step_3_title: Start the round and keep building momentum.
practice.how_it_works_step_3_body: We charge Credits only when your session begins, and you can still tweak the setup right before you start.
practice.no_topics: No topics found in this category
practice.no_topics_body: Try another category or switch off saved-only mode to explore more motions.
practice.saved_empty_body: Bookmark topics from the grid to build a shortlist for later practice sessions.
practice.saved_empty_panel_body: Turn off the saved-only filter or bookmark a topic from the catalog to reopen your practice setup.
practice.speaking_desc: Focus on clarity, confidence, and understandable English in a single speech.
practice.debate_desc: Focus on stance, clash, comparison, and impact in debate rounds.
practice.single_speech_desc: One prep + speech flow with speaking-focused feedback.
practice.full_desc: 5-round debate with AI opponent (Trường Teen style)
practice.prep_time_helper: Choose any whole minute from 1 to 10.
practice.speech_time_helper: Choose any whole minute from 2 to 7.
practice.ai_hints_desc: Shows brainstorm hints during preparation time
practice.session_cost_description: Speaking practice costs 100 Credits. Debate practice costs 200 Credits.
practice.settings_note: You can change settings anytime before starting.
practice.speak_placeholder: Start speaking... your words will appear here

audioCheck.title: Audio Check
audioCheck.description: Turn on your speakers or plug in headphones, then tap below to test.

session.motion_default_context: Define the clash, choose your strongest burden, and explain why your side matters more.
session.prep_prompt: Plan your opening and key points.
session.no_speech_detected: No speech detected. Check your microphone.
session.transcript_placeholder: Start speaking to see your transcript here...
session.audio_sample_hint: You'll hear a short sample tone
session.mic_allow_prompt: Please allow microphone access when prompted by your browser.
session.mic_detected: Audio input detected. You're ready to begin.
session.mic_enable_steps: Follow these steps to enable your microphone:
session.mic_step_1: Click the lock or camera icon in your browser address bar
session.mic_step_2: Find Microphone and change it to Allow
session.mic_step_3: Reload the page and try again
session.connect_microphone: Please connect a microphone and try again.
session.same_notes_helper: Same notes from prep. Add counterpoints while the AI debates.
session.ai_highlight_tip: Highlighted phrases mark claim, evidence, impact, or assumption. Add counter-rebuttal ideas before continuing.

chat.sidebar_empty: Start a new chat with your AI Coach.
chat.welcome_subtitle: I’ll use your recent sessions and scoring patterns to give sharper coaching.
chat.suggestion_opening: How do I structure a strong opening statement?

debate_stance.label: Strengthen my stance
debate_stance.prompt: Help me strengthen my stance on this motion.

weighing.label: Give me weighing
weighing.prompt: Give me the key weighing and comparison I should use in this debate.

clearer_english.label: Make this clearer
clearer_english.prompt: Help me say this more clearly in simple English.

stronger_opening.label: Stronger opening
stronger_opening.prompt: Give me a stronger opening statement for this topic.

rebuild_argument.label: Rebuild this argument
rebuild_argument.prompt: Rebuild this argument so the mechanism, weighing, and impact are much stronger.

test_assumptions.label: Test assumptions
test_assumptions.prompt: Test the assumptions in this case and show me the weakest links.

speech_structure.label: Structure my speech
speech_structure.prompt: Help me structure this speech into a clear opening, body, and closing.

sound_confident.label: Sound more confident
sound_confident.prompt: Help me make this speech sound more confident and natural.

lesson_key_idea.label: Key idea first
lesson_key_idea.prompt: Summarize the most important idea from this course lesson before I practice.

lesson_examples.label: Give examples
lesson_examples.prompt: Give me concrete examples I can use from this course lesson.

lesson_quiz.label: Quiz me on this
lesson_quiz.prompt: Quiz me on the key concepts from this course lesson before I practice.

lesson_drill.label: Turn into a drill
lesson_drill.prompt: Turn this course lesson into a short practice drill for me.

chat.preview_fallback: Open this conversation to continue coaching.
chat.load_error_body: Try again, or start a new chat.

coach.personalized_brief_title: {name}, here’s what your debate profile says right now.
coach.strongest_skill_fallback: As you practice more, this will become more precise.
coach.skill_snapshot_subtitle: Built from your scored debate history, not just this week.
coach.no_recent_sessions: Finish a scored session and it will appear here.

chat.error_message: Sorry, I encountered an error. Please try again.

history.page_subtitle: Review your past speaking and debate sessions. Every practice makes you better.
history.empty_subtitle: Start your first session and your history will appear here!
history.no_match_subtitle: Try adjusting your search or filters
history.progress_body: Your average score is up {count} points this month.
history.no_score_trend: Score trends appear after a few reviewed sessions.
history.suggested_next_move_body: Challenge real-time responses and improve rebuttals.
history.recommended_rebuttals_body: Learn how to respond to your opponent with strong, clear rebuttals.
history.recommended_delivery_body: Practice pacing, clarity, and emphasis with a short guided speaking round.
history.recommended_case_body: Strengthen your opening arguments with clearer claims and weighing.
history.delete_description: Are you sure you want to delete this session? This action cannot be undone.

profile.skill_empty: Complete a few debates to see your skill profile!

settings.headline: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account, preferences, and practice experience.
settings.hero_summary: Update how your profile appears, keep your practice defaults dialed in, and shape how Thinkfy feels every time you come back.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Update how your name and avatar appear across Thinkfy.

practice.title: Practice Defaults
practice.description: Set the timers and challenge level used for new solo sessions.

language.title: Language
language.description: The sidebar debate switcher is the fastest way to move between Vietnamese and English. Use this page for account-level language defaults.

voice.title: AI Voice
voice.description: Pick the voice used by the AI during practice and rebuttal playback.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Shape the way feedback is explained after each practice round.

notifications.title: Notifications & Reminders
notifications.description: Stay on track with gentle reminders and milestone updates.

privacy.title: Privacy & Data
privacy.description: Control analytics, exports, and your saved solo practice history.

fields.display_name_placeholder: Enter the name you want shown in Thinkfy
fields.handle_helper: Use 3-30 lowercase letters, numbers, underscores, or periods.
fields.profile_status_helper: A short line that can appear on your profile.

duration_helper.prep: Choose any whole minute from 1 to 10.
duration_helper.speech: Choose any whole minute from 2 to 7.

settings.language_hint: Use the sidebar debate switcher for quick changes. Saving here remembers your preferred default.
settings.practice_language_hint: This controls speech recognition, AI voice, rebuttals, and feedback language during practice.

detailed_feedback.title: Show detailed feedback
detailed_feedback.description: Get richer coaching notes and deeper breakdowns after sessions.

highlight_weak_areas.title: Highlight my weak areas
highlight_weak_areas.description: Point out the patterns I should fix first in upcoming rounds.

explain_like_im_learning.title: Explain like I am learning
explain_like_im_learning.description: Prefer simpler explanations, clearer examples, and gentler language.

advanced_terminology.title: Use advanced terminology
advanced_terminology.description: Include more formal debate language and sharper technical phrasing.

practice_reminders.title: Practice reminders
practice_reminders.description: Receive nudges to start another round and keep your momentum going.

streak_reminders.title: Daily streak reminders
streak_reminders.description: Get reminded before your current practice streak goes cold.

achievement_updates.title: Achievements & updates
achievement_updates.description: Hear about new milestones, feature launches, and progress moments.

smart_feature_popups.title: Smart feature popups
smart_feature_popups.description: Allow personalized in-app tips for practice, courses, streaks, and AI Coach.

email_notifications.title: Email notifications
email_notifications.description: Allow important reminders and product updates to be sent by email.

analytics.title: Analytics cookies
analytics.description: Allow product analytics so we can understand usage and improve the app.

download.title: Download My Data
download.description: Export your profile, preferences, practice history, duel summary, course progress, and chat history as JSON.

clear_history.title: Clear Practice History
clear_history.description: Delete your saved solo practice sessions and refresh visible analytics without touching duel results.
clear_history.confirm_description: This removes your saved solo practice sessions from history and refreshes related settings and analytics views. Duel records stay intact.

settings.sign_out_description: Sign out of your account on this device.

voice.title: AI Voice
voice.description: Choose the voice used for rebuttals, coaching playback, and spoken prompts.
voice.search_description: Search by name, accent, gender, provider, or quality.
voice.more_voices_description: Search the full catalog and choose one voice for practice playback.

courses.noCoursesYet: No courses yet. Create your first one!

wizard.title: Course Title
wizard.descriptionPlaceholder: What will students learn in this course?

visibility.publicDesc: Available to all users. Anyone can enroll.
visibility.restrictedDesc: Only assigned classes or individual students can access.

lesson.bodyPlaceholder: Write your lesson content in Markdown...

quiz.explanationPlaceholder: Explain why this is the correct answer...

matching.shuffleHint: Students will see these shuffled. Enter the correct matches here.

fillBlank.instruction: Type your passage. Use __BLANK_1__, __BLANK_2__, etc. for blanks.
fillBlank.passagePlaceholder: The main purpose of a __BLANK_1__ is to counter the opponent's __BLANK_2__.

dragOrder.instructionPlaceholder: Arrange these items in the correct order.
dragOrder.orderHint: Enter items in the correct order. Students will see them shuffled.

player.matchTerms: Match each term to its definition
player.restrictedAccess: This course is available by invitation only.
player.previewSavedVersion: This preview reflects the saved version of the course. Save changes in the editor to refresh it.
player.previewNoTracking: Progress, enrollment, and completion tracking are hidden in preview mode. Open an activity to check the learner experience.

sessionResult.noFeedback: No feedback is available for this session yet.
sessionResult.notFoundBody: This session may have been deleted or no longer exists.

casework.heading: Debate Case Diagnosis
casework.subheading: These notes focus on argument quality, missing reasoning layers, clash, and stronger rebuilds.

annotations.title: Annotated Transcript
annotations.description: Review the exact moments where your argument can be strengthened.
annotations.speaker: Speaker

skillDescriptions.clarity: Make your main point easy to follow from the first sentence.
skillDescriptions.logic: Link each claim to a clear chain of reasoning and impact.
skillDescriptions.rebuttal: Directly answer the other side and show why your case still stands.
skillDescriptions.evidence: Use examples, mechanisms, and proof that make your case concrete.
skillDescriptions.delivery: Sound steady, precise, and easy for the judge to track.

detail.heading: Detailed Feedback
detail.emptyStrengths: Strengths will appear here after analysis.
detail.emptyImprovements: Improvement notes will appear here after analysis.
detail.emptyTranscript: No transcript was recorded for this session.

fallbacks.strongest: This skill is leading your session right now.
fallbacks.needsWork: This is the clearest area to tighten next.
fallbacks.focus: Use the next round to make this skill more convincing.

referral.title: Challenge a friend to beat your score!
referral.body: You scored {score}/100. Share your invite link and both earn 600 bonus Credits.
referral.shareText: I scored {score}/100 on Thinkfy! Can you beat me? {link}

ai.title: The AI opponent edged this round.

fallback.title: Verdict
fallback.body: Verdict analysis will appear for newly analyzed full-round debates.

verdictPanel.emptyReasons: No deciding reasons were generated for this verdict.
verdictPanel.nextMovePrompt: Practice this as one clear comparative sentence before your next round.

duelHub.title: Pick your duel format
duelHub.subtitle: Matchmaking is a monitored beta with invisible skill matching. Friend rooms stay casual, shareable, and unrated.

match.title: Find a Match
match.description: Queue into a human opponent with hidden MMR, fair-play telemetry, and a ready check before the duel starts.

friend.title: Challenge a Friend
friend.description: Create a shareable room, send the code, and debate casually. These duels do not affect hidden rating.

leaderboards.languageNote: {language} has its own weekly ranking. Use the sidebar debate switcher to change leaderboard language.

rules.promotionOnly: Top {count} advance to the next league

info.title: How this leaderboard works
info.xpBody: XP is the only ranking currency. Scored practice XP in the selected debate language counts toward this weekly leaderboard; neutral XP can still count toward your lifetime profile level without changing weekly rank.
info.orgRules: Organization rankings are split by language and size band, so small active organizations are not crushed by larger ones.
info.capsBody: Daily and weekly XP caps stay global across languages. Duplicate, incomplete, or suspicious events can be held out of leaderboard totals before season results are finalized.

empty.personalBody: Finish a scored practice session in this language and this weekly league will start to fill in.
empty.organizationsTitle: No organizations in this band yet
empty.organizationsBody: Organizations appear here after members earn weekly XP in this language and size band.

scoreExplanation.title: XP explanation
scoreExplanation.countedWithReview: {visibleXp} counted this season, {suppressedXp} held for review.
scoreExplanation.empty: XP details will appear after your first counted leaderboard event.

kudos.error: Encouragement could not be sent right now.

profileSocial.title: Profile
profileSocial.privacy_preview: Previewing what students outside your friend list can see.

constructive_climber.title: Constructive Climber
constructive_climber.description: Complete your first strong constructive case.

evidence_builder.title: Evidence Builder
evidence_builder.description: Earn an 80+ score on evidence and logic.

crossfire_ready.title: Crossfire Ready
crossfire_ready.description: Win a duel and show strong clash awareness.

speed_demon.title: Speed Demon
speed_demon.description: Complete a focused practice round quickly.

weekly_warrior.title: Weekly Warrior
weekly_warrior.description: Keep a steady practice rhythm through the week.

actions.error: Unable to update this profile right now.

discovery.title: Find Friends
discovery.search_label: Search exact handle or friend code
discovery.friend_code_off: Friend-code search is off in Settings.
discovery.search_rate_limited: Too many missed searches. Try again later.
discovery.no_friends_body: Search by handle or share your friend code.
discovery.copy_unavailable: Copy unavailable. Select the code manually.
discovery.copy_failed: Copy failed. Select the code manually.
discovery.rotate_limited: Friend code rotation limit reached. Try again later.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Track skill growth, practice rhythm, and season performance.
analytics.public_subtitle: Public aggregate analytics only. Detailed session history stays private.
analytics.sessions_in_range: {count, plural, one {# session in this range} other {# sessions in this range}}
analytics.sessions_analyzed: {count, plural, one {# session analyzed} other {# sessions analyzed}}

activities.empty_body: Practice, duels, courses, and achievements will appear here.
activities.private_body: This activity feed is not visible from your current context.

achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.subtitle: Earn badges, titles, and XP while building debate skill.
achievements.private_body: This student's achievements are not visible from your current context.

not_found.title: Profile not found
not_found.body: This profile may have been moved, renamed, or made unavailable.

blocked.title: Profile unavailable
blocked.body: This profile is not available because a block is active.

private.title: Private profile
private.body: This student has chosen to keep their profile private.

limited.title: Limited profile
limited.body: Only profile basics are visible from this context.

visible.title: Profile visible
visible.body: This profile is visible from your current context.

analytics_private.title: Analytics are private
analytics_private.body: This student's analytics are only visible to them or approved friends.

activities_private.title: Activities are private
activities_private.body: This student's activity history is not visible from your current context.

achievements_private.title: Achievements are private
achievements_private.body: This student's achievements are not visible from your current context.

analyticsPage.title: Analytics
analyticsPage.subtitle: Track your progress and grow your debate skills.
analyticsPage.scope_note: Scores and skill trends follow your current language. Streaks, XP, and practice time stay shared across languages.
analyticsPage.skill_snapshot_subtitle: Built from your scored history, not just this week.

average_score.title: Recent Average Score
average_score.no_delta: Scored sessions will unlock this trend

analyticsPage.recent_sessions_subtitle: Review your latest solo rounds and judged duels.
analyticsPage.empty_body: Finish a few speaking or debate sessions and this page will start showing your progress, strongest skills, and next focus.
